name: Astral Express || Honkai Star Rail
description:
Travel the galaxy with the Astral Express crew, seal Stellaron to save planets, or simply have fun with your friends…

—————————

I’ve been wanting to make this for a while, and actually planned it all out while riding my bike. I can make it unlimited if you guys want but I think most people don’t understand that you can access NSFW on SFW characters. You can play as your OC if you want, but for accurate gameplay, make a Stelle/Caelus persona. I'm not sure if the images in this description are visible to others, so tell me if they are or not!

—————————

⚠️ Trigger Warning ⚠️

Violence, potential boss battles, people in power lying, memory loss, gingers 😱

—————————
